scope: fresh-context same-model feedback followed by one Chapter 3 repair and convergence gate
baseline_boundary: 7cf8dcf — run-007 closed as infrastructure-only H-044 inconclusive

starting_artifacts.repair_substrate: run-006 Arm A control, unpromoted; sha256 8a17c510230a182b10a1a089c582b1914ef81a3e98f8bf5ce5f2b171afca8860
starting_artifacts.first_raw_sol_review: run-006 Arm A Sol review; sha256 b35bc87058f1749dba704d6e48372269669c88437cbdcacfb263bbb4ededc34c

substrate_selection.reason: Arm A is the control, is no worse on the shared semantic blockers, and has the better objective short-sentence result

experiment.observation: the unchanged plan contained the needed boundary, but one raw review incompletely covered it and both run-006 writers retained the same defect class
experiment.mechanism: the unchanged writer can comply when two independent fresh contexts surface the evidence and chapter-ownership boundary before revision
steps: second native Sol ultra reviewer independently reviews exact Arm A, blind to the first review and history
one Opus 4.6 reasoning-none defect-scoped editor receives unchanged full context, exact Arm A, and both raw Sol reviews
two new native Sol ultra contexts independently review the exact revision
Gemini 3.1 Pro high runs a targeted shadow evidence-ownership audit with no word counting or positive gate

decision_rule.supported: second Sol independently corroborates both defect classes and the final chapter passes objective craft, two fresh Sol ACCEPTs, and the Gemini boundary shadow
decision_rule.refuted: both defect classes were independently surfaced before writing and either one survives or is recreated
decision_rule.inconclusive: second Sol does not corroborate, post-reviewers disagree, or only an unrelated new defect blocks

experiment.product_promotion: exact chapter only after two fresh Sol ACCEPTs, objective craft passage, and no directly source-substantiated Gemini shadow blocker
experiment.after_product_acceptance: immediately run full Chapters 1–3 Stage-A objective and blind pairwise gates before another optimization

writer_commission_exact: Produce the strongest complete final-book Chapter 3 from the unchanged full context and exact repair substrate. Read both raw independent reviews as evidence, reconcile them with the authoritative plan and style guide using your own judgment, and repair every substantiated defect without inventing claims or changing the chapter's one job. Preserve what already works, but revise as much as quality requires. Do not narrate your process. Return only the complete chapter, beginning with Chapter 3.

quality_prediction.metrics_py_short_sentences: at most 25.5%, a reduction of at least 5.0 points from 30.5%
quality_prediction.preserve_passing_voice_ranges: second person 25–33 per 1000; questions 8–10%; mean sentence 15–18 words
quality_prediction.semantic: remove universal prevalence/exposure claims, causal installation language, cue or anticipation diagnosis, and promised pull dissolution; retain duplicate and permanence repairs
quality_prediction.gate: two fresh Sol ACCEPTs and no directly verifiable Gemini shadow blocker

held_constant: accepted research, framing, normalized plan, and prior chapters
shared chapter-writer, chapter-reviewer, and style prompts
Opus 4.6 through OpenRouter with reasoning none
native Sol ultra for blocker-bearing full reviews
fresh reviewer contexts and no time or reasoning cap
no shared prompt, plan, style, research, schema, or live chapter change before convergence

corroborated_defect_classes: unsupported advertising or installation causation and premature C-13 ownership
universalized repetition or pull mechanism owned by C-10

shadow_evidence_auditor.task: targeted evidence and chapter-ownership trace only; no counting and no positive product gate

measurement_policy: objective code supplies counts; full Sol reviews judge the complete chapter; Gemini shadow reports only directly traceable evidence or ownership blockers
direction_audit: GO on a clean new run using working models; no silent H-044 substitution, shared-prompt amendment, checklist synthesis, or deterministic prose control
factory_promotion_boundary: same-family correlation is explicit; only the product may advance, while feedback coverage requires later cross-family, cross-chapter, and Stage-C validation
diagnostic_status: PASSED — second fresh Sol independently corroborated both preregistered defect classes
notes: The single Opus repair completed with zero reasoning tokens and stopped normally. It passed planned length, questions, and mean-sentence ranges but failed the preregistered craft movement before semantic review: short sentences rose from 30.5% to 31.9% and second-person density fell from 27.6 to 23.4 per 1,000. No causal or product verdict is assigned before the fresh reviews.
